nodes.name: 01 - Webhook Ingress Production
nodes.notes: Entrada de producao via webhook. Placeholders de autenticacao esperados: X-API-Key, Authorization Bearer e HMAC Signature.

nodes.name: 00 - Manual Trigger Replay
nodes.notes: Inicio manual de replay. Workflow permanece inativo e sem gatilho externo.

parameters.jsCode: const incoming = items[0]?.json ?? {}; const hasIncomingPayload = Object.keys(incoming).length > 0 && Object.keys(incoming).some((key) => key !== 'executionMode'); const payload = incoming.payload ?? incoming.body ?? incoming ?? {}; const executionId = 'exec-' + Date.now(); const traceId = payload.trace_id || 'trace-missing'; const caseId = payload.case_id || 'case-missing'; return [{ json: { payload, workflow_context: { workflow_mode: 'production_ready', environment: 'production', source: hasIncomingPayload ? 'incoming_payload' : 'manual_trigger_empty_payload', generated_at: new Date().toISOString(), workflow_name: 'SOC-Octopus-Agent - Pergunta Vulnerabilidade Production', workflow_version: '1.0.0', observability: { started_at_ms: Date.now(), execution_id: executionId, correlation_id: [caseId, traceId].join(':'), trace_id: traceId }, auth_placeholders: { x_api_key: incoming.headers?.['x-api-key'] ?? '{{X-API-Key}}', authorization_bearer: incoming.headers?.authorization ?? '{{Authorization Bearer}}', hmac_signature: incoming.headers?.['x-hmac-signature'] ?? '{{HMAC Signature}}' } }, security_controls: { external_calls_allowed: false, remediation_allowed: false, credentials_allowed: false, production_allowed: false, production_changes_allowed: false, human_approval_required: true } } }];

nodes.name: 02 - Receber Pergunta Vulnerabilidade Production
nodes.notes: Recebe payload do webhook ou replay manual e prepara contexto de execucao.

parameters.jsCode: function text(value) { return value === undefined || value === null ? '' : String(value).trim(); } function lower(value) { return text(value).toLowerCase(); } function bool(value) { return value === true || value === 'true'; } function parseSummary(summary) { const entities = {}; for (const part of text(summary).split(';')) { const pieces = part.split('='); const key = text(pieces.shift()); const value = text(pieces.join('=')); if (key && value) entities[key] = value; } return entities; } function list(value) { if (Array.isArray(value)) return value.map(text).filter(Boolean); return text(value).split(/[;,]/).map(text).filter(Boolean); } return items.map((item) => { const payload = item.json.payload ?? {}; const entities = payload.entities && typeof payload.entities === 'object' && !Array.isArray(payload.entities) ? payload.entities : parseSummary(payload.entities_summary); const question = text(payload.question_text || payload.question || payload.description); const evidence = list(payload.evidence || payload.evidence_summary); const vulnerability = text(payload.vulnerability || entities.vulnerability); const service = text(payload.service || entities.service); const exposure = lower(payload.exposure || entities.exposure); const normalized = { case_id: text(payload.case_id), trace_id: text(payload.trace_id), input_type: lower(payload.input_type), source_system: text(payload.source_system), received_at: text(payload.received_at), severity: lower(payload.severity), title: text(payload.title), description: text(payload.description), question_text: question, classification_hint: lower(payload.classification_hint), entities, vulnerability_context: { vulnerability, host: text(payload.host || entities.host), service, exposure, asset_criticality: lower(payload.asset_criticality || entities.asset_criticality || 'unknown'), cvss_available: bool(payload.cvss_available), exploit_seen: bool(payload.exploit_seen), patch_available: bool(payload.patch_available), maintenance_window_known: bool(payload.maintenance_window_known) }, evidence, flags: { synthetic_payload: bool(payload.synthetic_payload), contains_real_customer_data: bool(payload.contains_real_customer_data), contains_credentials: bool(payload.contains_credentials), human_approval_required_for_action: bool(payload.human_approval_required_for_action) } }; return { json: { ...item.json, normalized, processing_stage: 'normalization', normalization_status: 'completed' } }; });

nodes.name: 03 - Normalizar Pergunta Vulnerabilidade
nodes.notes: Normaliza pergunta, entidades, contexto de vulnerabilidade e evidencias.

parameters.jsCode: const allowedInputTypes = new Set(['question', 'ticket', 'soc_alert']); const allowedSeverities = new Set(['low', 'medium', 'high', 'critical']); const requiredFields = ['case_id', 'trace_id', 'input_type', 'severity', 'title', 'description']; return items.map((item) => { const normalized = item.json.normalized ?? {}; const context = normalized.vulnerability_context ?? {}; const flags = normalized.flags ?? {}; const missing_fields = requiredFields.filter((field) => !normalized[field]); const invalid_fields = []; if (normalized.input_type && !allowedInputTypes.has(normalized.input_type)) invalid_fields.push('input_type'); if (normalized.severity && !allowedSeverities.has(normalized.severity)) invalid_fields.push('severity'); if (!normalized.question_text) invalid_fields.push('question_text'); if (!context.vulnerability && !context.service && !context.host) invalid_fields.push('vulnerability_context'); const controls = item.json.security_controls ?? {}; const security_violations = []; if (flags.contains_real_customer_data) security_violations.push('contains_real_customer_data'); if (flags.contains_credentials) security_violations.push('contains_credentials'); if (controls.external_calls_allowed) security_violations.push('external_calls_allowed'); if (controls.credentials_allowed) security_violations.push('credentials_allowed'); if (controls.production_allowed) security_violations.push('production_allowed'); if (controls.remediation_allowed) security_violations.push('remediation_allowed'); if (controls.database_allowed) security_violations.push('database_allowed'); if (controls.redis_allowed) security_violations.push('redis_allowed'); const is_valid = missing_fields.length === 0 && invalid_fields.length === 0 && security_violations.length === 0; return { json: { ...item.json, processing_stage: 'validation', validation: { is_valid, status: is_valid ? 'valid' : 'invalid', required_fields: requiredFields, missing_fields, invalid_fields, security_violations, validation_notes: is_valid ? 'Pergunta de vulnerabilidade aceita para producao controlada.' : 'Pergunta bloqueada antes de classificacao.' } } }; });

nodes.name: 04 - Validar Campos Obrigatorios
nodes.notes: Valida campos minimos, contexto tecnico e controles de seguranca.

nodes.name: 05 - Entrada Valida?
nodes.notes: Separa pergunta valida de rejeicao controlada.

parameters.jsCode: return items.map((item) => { const normalized = item.json.normalized ?? {}; const validation = item.json.validation ?? {}; return { json: { ...item.json, processing_stage: 'controlled_rejection', controlled_rejection: { rejected: true, reason: 'Pergunta de vulnerabilidade invalida ou bloqueada por controles de seguranca.', missing_fields: validation.missing_fields ?? [], invalid_fields: validation.invalid_fields ?? [], security_violations: validation.security_violations ?? [], case_id: normalized.case_id || 'not_available', trace_id: normalized.trace_id || 'not_available', next_action: 'Corrigir payload e reexecutar manualmente em ambiente controlado.', automated_action_executed: false } } }; });

nodes.name: 05.1 - Rejeicao Controlada
nodes.notes: Trata pergunta invalida sem executar acao externa.

parameters.jsCode: function includesAny(text, terms) { return terms.some((term) => text.includes(term)); } function baseRisk(severity, context) { if (context.exploit_seen) return 'critical'; if (severity === 'critical') return 'critical'; if (severity === 'high') return 'high'; if (context.exposure === 'internet_facing' && (context.vulnerability || context.service)) return 'high'; if (severity === 'medium') return 'medium'; return 'low'; } const routeTerms = [ { route: 'vulnerability', terms: ['vulnerability', 'vulnerabilidade', 'cve', 'cvss', 'priorizacao', 'priorizar'] }, { route: 'exposed_service', terms: ['exposto', 'internet_facing', 'internet', 'publico', 'public-facing', 'servico exposto', 'web'] }, { route: 'patch_planning', terms: ['patch', 'janela', 'atualizacao', 'reinicio', 'correcao', 'remediacao'] }, { route: 'configuration_risk', terms: ['configuracao', 'hardening', 'baseline', 'porta aberta', 'misconfiguration', 'config'] } ]; const specialistsByRoute = { vulnerability: ['vulnerabilidades', 'infraestrutura_plataformas', 'solucao_remediacao', 'consolidador'], exposed_service: ['exposicao_servico', 'rede', 'vulnerabilidades', 'consolidador'], patch_planning: ['planejamento_patch', 'infraestrutura_plataformas', 'gestao_mudanca', 'consolidador'], configuration_risk: ['hardening_configuracao', 'infraestrutura_plataformas', 'consolidador'], unknown: ['triagem_soc', 'consolidador'] }; return items.map((item) => { const normalized = item.json.normalized ?? {}; const context = normalized.vulnerability_context ?? {}; const corpus = [normalized.classification_hint, normalized.title, normalized.description, normalized.question_text, JSON.stringify(normalized.entities ?? {}), JSON.stringify(context), (normalized.evidence ?? []).join(' ')].join(' ').toLowerCase(); let probable_root_cause = 'unknown'; let confidence_level = 'low'; let classification_reason = 'Nenhuma regra local identificou rota especifica para a pergunta.'; const directRoutes = new Set(['vulnerability', 'exposed_service', 'patch_planning', 'configuration_risk', 'unknown']); if (directRoutes.has(normalized.classification_hint)) { probable_root_cause = normalized.classification_hint; confidence_level = probable_root_cause === 'unknown' ? 'low' : 'high'; classification_reason = 'classification_hint indicou rota ' + probable_root_cause + '.'; } else { const matched = routeTerms.find((rule) => includesAny(corpus, rule.terms)); if (matched) { probable_root_cause = matched.route; confidence_level = 'medium'; classification_reason = 'Regras locais identificaram contexto ' + matched.route + '.'; } } const risk_level = baseRisk(normalized.severity, context); const possible_false_positive = normalized.evidence.length === 0 || !context.cvss_available; return { json: { ...item.json, processing_stage: 'classification', classification: { probable_root_cause, routing_key: probable_root_cause, risk_level, confidence_level, classification_reason, false_positive_assessment: possible_false_positive ? 'possible_or_context_incomplete' : 'not_indicated_by_lab_rules', possible_false_positive, specialists_recommended: specialistsByRoute[probable_root_cause] ?? specialistsByRoute.unknown } } }; });

nodes.name: 06 - Classificar Pergunta Vulnerabilidade
nodes.notes: Classifica a pergunta usando regras locais de producao controlada.

nodes.name: 07 - Switch Roteamento Vulnerabilidade
nodes.notes: Roteia para especialistas locais sem consulta externa.

parameters.jsCode: return items.map((item) => { const normalized = item.json.normalized ?? {}; const context = normalized.vulnerability_context ?? {}; return { json: { ...item.json, processing_stage: 'vulnerability_specialist', specialist_analysis: { specialist: 'vulnerability', diagnosis: 'Pergunta exige priorizacao de vulnerabilidade com contexto incompleto e sem enriquecimento externo.', evidence_considered: normalized.evidence ?? [], affected_entities: { host: context.host || 'host_nao_informado', service: context.service || 'servico_nao_informado', vulnerability: context.vulnerability || 'vulnerabilidade_nao_informada', exposure: context.exposure || 'exposicao_nao_informada' }, recommendation: 'Priorizar pela exposicao, criticidade do ativo, explorabilidade conhecida internamente e disponibilidade de janela de correcao, sem executar patch automaticamente.', technical_steps: ['Confirmar escopo do ativo e proprietario do servico.', 'Validar exposicao e criticidade do ativo em fonte autorizada quando disponivel.', 'Coletar CVSS, EPSS ou inteligencia de exploracao apenas em etapa futura autorizada.', 'Definir prioridade e proposta de remediacao para aprovacao humana.'], escalation: 'Escalonar para equipe de Vulnerabilidades se a exposicao for confirmada ou o ativo for critico.', critical_actions_need_approval: ['aplicacao_de_patch', 'reinicio_de_servico', 'alteracao_de_configuracao', 'janela_de_mudanca'], remediation_allowed: false, route_confirmed: true } } }; });

nodes.name: 08 - Especialista Vulnerabilidade
nodes.notes: Analise local de priorizacao sem scanner real ou IA externa.

parameters.jsCode: return items.map((item) => { const normalized = item.json.normalized ?? {}; const context = normalized.vulnerability_context ?? {}; return { json: { ...item.json, processing_stage: 'exposed_service_specialist', specialist_analysis: { specialist: 'exposed_service', diagnosis: 'Vulnerabilidade associada a servico exposto ou potencialmente acessivel em producao controlada.', evidence_considered: normalized.evidence ?? [], affected_entities: { host: context.host || 'host_nao_informado', service: context.service || 'servico_nao_informado', exposure: context.exposure || 'exposicao_nao_informada' }, recommendation: 'Tratar exposicao como fator de aumento de prioridade, mas validar alcance e impacto antes de qualquer mudanca.', technical_steps: ['Confirmar se o servico esta exposto no escopo do caso.', 'Verificar dependencia de negocio e proprietario do servico.', 'Avaliar mitigacao temporaria sem aplicar bloqueios automaticamente.', 'Encaminhar bloqueio, hardening ou patch para aprovacao humana.'], escalation: 'Escalonar para Rede/Plataforma se houver servico exposto com alto impacto.', critical_actions_need_approval: ['bloqueio_de_porta', 'alteracao_de_firewall', 'despublicacao_de_servico', 'patch_em_servico_exposto'], remediation_allowed: false, route_confirmed: true } } }; });

nodes.name: 08.1 - Especialista Servico Exposto
nodes.notes: Analise local de exposicao sem firewall real ou inventario produtivo.

parameters.jsCode: return items.map((item) => { const normalized = item.json.normalized ?? {}; const context = normalized.vulnerability_context ?? {}; return { json: { ...item.json, processing_stage: 'patch_planning_specialist', specialist_analysis: { specialist: 'patch_planning', diagnosis: 'Pergunta envolve planejamento de correcao, janela de mudanca ou reinicio de servico.', evidence_considered: normalized.evidence ?? [], affected_entities: { host: context.host || 'host_nao_informado', service: context.service || 'servico_nao_informado', patch_available: context.patch_available === true, maintenance_window_known: context.maintenance_window_known === true }, recommendation: 'Preparar plano de patch com validacao de impacto, rollback e aprovacao humana antes de execucao.', technical_steps: ['Confirmar disponibilidade de patch em fonte autorizada na etapa apropriada.', 'Identificar dependencia e impacto do reinicio.', 'Definir janela de mudanca e plano de rollback.', 'Submeter execucao para aprovacao humana e gestao de mudanca.'], escalation: 'Escalonar para Infraestrutura/Plataforma e Change Management se houver patch com impacto operacional.', critical_actions_need_approval: ['aplicacao_de_patch', 'reinicio_de_servico', 'rollback', 'mudanca_em_producao'], remediation_allowed: false, route_confirmed: true } } }; });

nodes.name: 08.2 - Especialista Planejamento Patch
nodes.notes: Planejamento local de patch sem executar remediacao.

parameters.jsCode: return items.map((item) => { const normalized = item.json.normalized ?? {}; const context = normalized.vulnerability_context ?? {}; return { json: { ...item.json, processing_stage: 'configuration_risk_specialist', specialist_analysis: { specialist: 'configuration_risk', diagnosis: 'Pergunta sugere risco de configuracao, hardening ou baseline associado a vulnerabilidade.', evidence_considered: normalized.evidence ?? [], affected_entities: { host: context.host || 'host_nao_informado', service: context.service || 'servico_nao_informado', exposure: context.exposure || 'exposicao_nao_informada' }, recommendation: 'Validar baseline e configuracao esperada antes de propor ajuste, sem alterar configuracao automaticamente.', technical_steps: ['Comparar configuracao observada com baseline aprovado em etapa futura autorizada.', 'Identificar controle compensatorio possivel sem execucao automatica.', 'Avaliar risco de indisponibilidade por hardening.', 'Encaminhar ajuste para aprovacao humana.'], escalation: 'Escalonar para Infraestrutura/Hardening se o risco de configuracao for confirmado.', critical_actions_need_approval: ['alteracao_de_configuracao', 'hardening_de_servico', 'fechamento_de_porta', 'mudanca_de_baseline'], remediation_allowed: false, route_confirmed: true } } }; });

nodes.name: 08.3 - Especialista Risco Configuracao
nodes.notes: Analise local de configuracao sem alterar servicos.

parameters.jsCode: return items.map((item) => { const normalized = item.json.normalized ?? {}; return { json: { ...item.json, processing_stage: 'unknown_specialist', specialist_analysis: { specialist: 'unknown', diagnosis: 'Pergunta de vulnerabilidade nao roteada por regra local especifica.', evidence_considered: normalized.evidence ?? [], affected_entities: normalized.vulnerability_context ?? {}, recommendation: 'Manter revisao humana e solicitar contexto adicional antes de decidir prioridade ou acao.', technical_steps: ['Revisar pergunta e contexto normalizado.', 'Solicitar dados de ativo, exposicao, criticidade e evidencia tecnica.', 'Reexecutar com classification_hint especifico se apropriado.', 'Nao executar remediacao automatica.'], escalation: 'Escalonar para triagem SOC humana.', critical_actions_need_approval: ['qualquer_acao_critica'], remediation_allowed: false, route_confirmed: true } } }; });

nodes.name: 08.4 - Especialista Unknown
nodes.notes: Fallback seguro para pergunta nao classificada.

parameters.jsCode: return items.map((item) => { const normalized = item.json.normalized ?? {}; const validation = item.json.validation ?? { is_valid: false, status: 'invalid' }; const rejection = item.json.controlled_rejection ?? null; const classification = item.json.classification ?? { probable_root_cause: rejection ? 'not_classified' : 'unknown', risk_level: 'unknown', confidence_level: 'low', classification_reason: rejection ? 'Classificacao nao executada por rejeicao controlada.' : 'Classificacao nao disponivel.' }; const specialist = item.json.specialist_analysis ?? null; const controls = item.json.security_controls ?? {}; const blocked = rejection?.rejected === true || validation.is_valid !== true; const status = blocked ? 'rejected_invalid_payload' : 'analysis_completed_prod'; const diagnosis = blocked ? rejection?.reason : (specialist?.diagnosis ?? 'Diagnostico especializado nao produzido.'); const solution_recommendation = blocked ? (rejection?.next_action ?? 'Corrigir payload antes de nova execucao.') : (specialist?.recommendation ?? 'Revisao humana obrigatoria.'); const output = { execution_id: normalized.observability?.execution_id || 'exec-' + Date.now(), workflow_name: item.json.workflow_context?.workflow_name || 'SOC-Octopus-Agent - Pergunta Vulnerabilidade Production', workflow_version: item.json.workflow_context?.workflow_version || '1.0.0', correlation_id: item.json.workflow_context?.observability?.correlation_id || [normalized.case_id || 'case-missing', normalized.trace_id || 'trace-missing'].join(':'), trace_id: normalized.trace_id || rejection?.trace_id || 'not_available', case_id: normalized.case_id || rejection?.case_id || 'not_available', status, execution_status: status, input_type: normalized.input_type || 'not_available', severity: normalized.severity || 'not_available', probable_root_cause: classification.probable_root_cause, risk_level: classification.risk_level, risk_score: classification.risk_score, confidence_level: classification.confidence_level, confidence_score: classification.confidence_score, diagnosis, solution_recommendation, technical_steps: specialist?.technical_steps ?? [], escalation: specialist?.escalation ?? 'Revisao humana obrigatoria antes de qualquer acao.', security_notes: { external_calls_allowed: controls.external_calls_allowed === true, credentials_allowed: controls.credentials_allowed === true, production_allowed: controls.production_allowed === true, remediation_allowed: controls.remediation_allowed === true, database_allowed: controls.database_allowed === true, redis_allowed: controls.redis_allowed === true, automated_action_executed: false, human_approval_required: true }, human_approval: { required: true, approval_status: 'pending_human_review', required_for_actions: specialist?.critical_actions_need_approval ?? [] }, audit_summary: 'Workflow production ready para pergunta de vulnerabilidade; auditoria preparada para persistencia, SIEM sync, ticketing, cache e aprovacao humana.' }; return { json: { case_id: output.case_id, trace_id: output.trace_id, output_ready_for_human_review: true, soc_octopus_output: output } }; });

nodes.name: 09 - Consolidador Final
nodes.notes: Consolida validacao, classificacao, analise especialista e controles em saida revisavel.

nodes.notes: Integracao futura read only com plataforma de vulnerabilidades.

nodes.notes: Integracao futura com SIEM.

nodes.notes: Cache e correlacao em Redis.
